message:
test(fleet): add 44 integration tests for fleet mode (process_triage-ref7)

Covers inventory parsing, discovery config loading, SSH scan conversion,
fleet session creation/aggregation, FDR pooling math, safety budgets,
serialization roundtrips, E2E pipelines, and 100-host stress tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
